## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `dev` (not `main`) unless this is a release promotion
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Code is in English (identifiers, comments, UI copy)
- [ ] Uses arrow functions / ES2023, consistent with the codebase
- [ ] No new dependencies (or the addition is justified below)
- [ ] localStorage data model changes are backward compatible
